title: Stark (disambiguation)
content:
'''Stark''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Stark Hyperspace War]]''', a conflict fought sometime prior to the [[Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Sully Stark]]''', a member of the [[Hidden Path]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Historia Galactica Volume Seventy: Iaco Stark to the Clone Wars|''Historia Galactica'' Volume Seventy: ''Iaco Stark to the Clone Wars'']]'''
*'''[[Jona T. Stark]]''', a senior [[TIE pilot]] trainer stationed onboard the [[Vengeance II|''Vengeance'']]
*'''[[Stark]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] in the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].
*'''[[Stark Commercial Combine]]''', [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark's]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang
*'''[[Stark Compound]]'''
*'''[[Stark family]]'''
**'''[[Arris Rossum]]'''
**'''[[Dah'lis Stark]]'''
**'''[[Elli Stark]]'''
**'''[[Iaclyn Stark]]'''
**'''[[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and pirate who initiated the Stark Hyperspace War
*'''[[Stark Forests]]'''
*'''[[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]''', a major war in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]
*"'''[[Stark Memory]]'''," a popular song performed by [[Lord Kavad and the Skaalite Orchestra]]
*'''[[Stark Municipal Park]]'''
*'''[[Stark Veteran Assembly]]''', an organization aimed to support [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] veterans of the Stark Hyperspace War
*'''''[[Stark Wing]]'''''
*'''[[Starks]]'''

==Real world==
===Legends===
*'''''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War]]'''''
*'''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War'']]'''
*'''''[[The Curse of Stark]]'''''

===Individuals===
*'''[[Ed Stark]]'''
*'''[[Koo Stark]]''', the actress who portrayed [[Camie Loneozner]] in scenes deleted from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]
